hero.subtitle: LifeKit is your AI life assistant — helping you settle, earn, and connect no matter where in the world you land.
hero.note: No credit card needed · Available globally
hero.mockupMessage: You just moved to Lisbon. Here's your first week plan.
hero.mockupNearby: 2 people near you · tap to view

process.label: The Process
process.title: From landed to settled in three moves.
process.step1Desc: Tell Kit where you are, what you need, and what you can offer. It listens like a person, not a search engine.
process.step2Desc: Kit surfaces services, opportunities, and communities tailored to your situation — not a generic feed.
process.step3Desc: Book services, swap skills, join your people. Start building a life that works.

features.label: What's Inside
features.title: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
features.f1Desc: Your 24/7 AI concierge that finds services, answers questions, and plans your next move — wherever you land.
features.f2Desc: Book trusted local services in seconds, or list your own and get discovered by people who need you.
features.f3Desc: Trade your skills with others — no money needed. A haircut for a lesson, design for cooking. Always free.
features.f4Desc: Find your people. Join local hubs, share tips, get referrals, and build connections that actually help.

scenarios.label: Who It's For
scenarios.title: Wherever you're starting from.
scenarios.s1Title: Just landed in a new city?
scenarios.s1Desc: Kit walks you through your first week — from SIM cards to coworking spaces to people worth meeting.
scenarios.s2Title: Want to earn while you settle?
scenarios.s2Desc: The Opportunity Engine matches your skills with demand nearby. No job board scrolling.
scenarios.s3Desc: Communities built for where you are and what you care about. Not another Discord to get lost in.

bookings.subtitle: Customers build a cart of services, pay through our secure escrow system, and you get notified immediately. Pricing, scheduling, and payouts — all automatic.
bookings.feature1Desc: Customers can book multiple services from multiple providers in a single checkout.
bookings.feature2Desc: Funds are held securely until the service is delivered. You get paid, guaranteed.
bookings.feature3Desc: Set a flat rate or charge per hour — the app handles the maths for you.

aiTools.title: Five AI tools working for you around the clock.
aiTools.subtitle: Every major feature in LifeKit has an AI layer powering it — a genuine force multiplier for your income.
aiTools.tool1Desc: Scans local demand daily and surfaces the exact services you should be offering this week to maximise revenue.
aiTools.tool2Title: List a service in under 10 seconds
aiTools.tool2Desc: Describe your skill in plain language. AI writes the full listing — title, description, and price — instantly.
aiTools.tool3Desc: An AI assistant helps customers find services, answer questions, and book around the clock — while you sleep.
aiTools.tool4Title: A 7-day plan built just for you
aiTools.tool4Desc: A personalised onboarding roadmap guides new providers through their first bookings step by step.
aiTools.tool5Desc: Our AI finds the most compatible swap partners based on skill value, location, and availability.

social.label: Real Providers. Real Earnings.
social.title: Providers already earning on LifeKit.
social.t1Text: LifeKit's AI wrote my entire service listing in under 10 seconds. Bookings came in the same day. I've never had this kind of visibility before.
social.t2Text: The Opportunity Radar told me to add nail extensions — that one service doubled my revenue within a month. The AI insight is genuinely useful.
social.t3Text: I used Skill Swap to trade my photography sessions for accounting help. Real value without spending a penny. Complete game changer.

finalCta.subtitle: Join thousands of people using LifeKit to settle, earn, and connect — wherever they land next.
finalCta.note: Free to join · No card required · Ships globally

footer.tagline: The AI-powered service ecosystem that lets skilled providers earn, swap, and grow together.
footer.builtWith: Built with care for every skilled professional.

login.sideSubtitle: Your customers are waiting. Sign in to manage bookings, track earnings, and grow your business with AI.
login.testimonial1: LifeKit's AI wrote my entire service listing in under 10 seconds. Bookings came in the same day.
login.testimonial2: The Opportunity Radar told me to add nail extensions — that one service doubled my revenue.

register.trust3: AI-powered income insights from day one
register.trust4: AI Autofill creates your listings in seconds
